SYSTEM GOAL:
Build a full autonomous AI development + lead intelligence platform.

REQUIRED OUTPUT:

FRONTEND
- Next.js 15
- Tailwind
- Monaco editor
- dashboard
- admin control panel

BACKEND
- Node.js / FastAPI
- Prisma + Postgres
- Redis queue

- tool execution

- Railway deployment

- API works
- scraper returns data
- DB stores leads
- tests pass
- deployment works
